Name: Thomas Myers
Notable Clients / Recognition: Author of 'Anatomy Trains'; trained with Ida Rolf, Moshe Feldenkrais, Buckminster Fuller; global educator
Why They're Elite: Created the Anatomy Trains myofascial meridians map used by bodyworkers worldwide. The definitive authority on fascial connectivity and structural integration.
Notes: Pioneer - trains thousands of practitioners globally

Name: Peter Levine
Notable Clients / Recognition: Author of 'Waking the Tiger'; developed Somatic Experiencing; featured in NYT, Psychology Today; 50+ years experience
Why They're Elite: Created Somatic Experiencing, the gold-standard trauma resolution modality used by therapists worldwide. PhD in medical biophysics and psychology.
Notes: Founder of SE - lives in LA area

Name: Lauren Roxburgh
Notable Clients / Recognition: Called 'The Body Whisperer'; featured in Goop, Vogue, NYT; clients include Gwyneth Paltrow, Jordana Brewster, Devon Aoki
Why They're Elite: Known as the world's most in-demand bodyworker. Bestselling author, fascia specialist who works with A-list celebrities, athletes, and top doctors.
Notes: Also on California list - based in LA

Name: Sue Hitzmann
Notable Clients / Recognition: Creator of MELT Method; NYT bestselling author; featured in Vogue, Dr. Oz, Good Morning America; fascia research pioneer
Why They're Elite: Internationally recognized fascia educator and manual therapist. Created MELT Method used by millions worldwide. CEO of Longevity Fitness.

Name: Wim Hof
Notable Clients / Recognition: 26 Guinness World Records; featured in every major publication; trained thousands including celebrities and elite athletes
Why They're Elite: The Iceman - pioneered breathwork and cold exposure methods backed by university research. His method is used by Navy SEALs, pro athletes, and executives worldwide.

Name: Dr. Ida Rolf (Legacy: The Rolf Institute)
Notable Clients / Recognition: Founded Rolfing; her students include all major structural integration practitioners; Esalen legend
Why They're Elite: Though deceased, the Rolf Institute carries her legacy as the gold standard in structural integration training and practice.
Notes: Legacy institution - current Advanced Rolfers carry the torch

Name: John Barnes
Notable Clients / Recognition: Developed John Barnes MFR approach; trained 100,000+ therapists; author of multiple books; featured in major media
Why They're Elite: The world's leading authority on myofascial release. Has trained more therapists in MFR than anyone alive. His approach is the standard in the field.

Name: Dr. Robert Schleip
Notable Clients / Recognition: Director of Fascia Research Group at Ulm University; author; keynote speaker worldwide; bridges science and practice
Why They're Elite: The world's foremost fascia researcher. His work at Ulm University has transformed how we understand connective tissue. Bridges clinical practice with cutting-edge research.

Name: Esther Gokhale
Notable Clients / Recognition: Called 'Posture Guru of Silicon Valley' by NYT; author of '8 Steps to a Pain-Free Back'; clients include tech executives
Why They're Elite: Developed the Gokhale Method for posture restoration based on studying indigenous populations. Featured in NYT, BBC, NPR. Silicon Valley's go-to posture expert.

Name: Dr. Deepak Chopra
Notable Clients / Recognition: 90+ books; Oprah collaborator; founded Chopra Center; featured everywhere; clients include world leaders and celebrities
